aeFetch.text:
s0l26-0s • AE Central Command Pack
AE Central Command Pack
Credential Hub Launcher sits at the center of the AE Central Command Pack. Use it to move through the built-in vault lanes, the free AE stack guidance, and the linked package surfaces without guessing where anything lives.

AE Command Pack

The package now includes dedicated AE, Credential, Ops, and Service Pack pages so the team can move from capture to offer selection, payment clarity, and post-close operations without guessing.

Credential Hub Launcher

Launcher, sitemap, connected branch-app links, glass shell, local backup, optional lock, direct route access, the lead-to-ledger ops editorial, and the new service-selection master pack all stay intact underneath the command-pack framing.

Checking sync state…
Loading page…

Add Item

Unlock Credential Vault

This Credential Vault lane is stored locally with an access code. Enter the code to load your contacts, credentials, projects, notes, and relationship timeline on this device.

Step 1 / 1

Walkthrough

Learn the app.

checks.message: Deny fake runtime-service launch claims loudly when package scripts point to missing backing files
Write canonical platform registry records that deep scan and valuation lanes can consume by source path without polluting the live intake lane with proof fixtures
Generate an operator-facing launchpad surface showing ready and denied profiles for the imported platform
